 612u,  567u,  520u,  477u,  441u,  418u,  409u,  415u,  437u,  472u,  516u,  565u,  613u,  655u,  686u,  702u,
 700u,  680u,  644u,  593u,  533u,  470u,  412u,  364u,  335u,  330u,  353u,  408u,  495u,  612u,  757u,  923u,
1104u, 1292u, 1478u, 1656u, 1818u, 1958u, 2072u, 2157u, 2214u, 2242u, 2245u, 2227u, 2192u, 2146u, 2094u, 2040u,
1988u, 1941u, 1901u, 1868u, 1842u, 1821u, 1805u, 1792u, 1778u, 1763u, 1745u, 1724u, 1698u, 1669u, 1638u, 1605u,
1571u, 1539u, 1508u, 1481u, 1456u, 1434u, 1415u, 1396u, 1378u, 1359u, 1338u, 1314u, 1287u, 1258u, 1225u, 1191u,
1156u, 1121u, 1089u, 1059u, 1033u, 1010u,  992u,  976u,  962u,  948u,  933u,  915u,  893u,  866u,  834u,  797u,
 757u,  715u,  674u,  636u,  605u,  583u,  573u,  576u 
};

static inline const uint16_t *getTable(uint16_t K){
    switch(K) {
        case 1: return yK_1;
        case 2: return yK_2;
        case 3: return yK_3;
        case 4: return yK_4;
        case 5: return yK_5;
        case 6: return yK_6;
        case 7: return yK_7;
        case 8: return yK_8;
        case 9: return yK_9;
        case 10: return yK_10;
        default: return yK_10;
    }
}
